name: newt
description: Newt is a quirky AI development assistant providing architecture analysis, automated code reviews, security auditing, performance analysis, code quality insights, PR review automation, and structured brainstorming.

commands.name: accessibility-audit
commands.description: Audit UI components for WCAG compliance and accessibility issues

commands.name: adr-draft
commands.description: Draft architecture decision records for technical decisions

commands.name: architecture-check
commands.description: Deep structural validation and architecture pattern analysis

commands.name: brainstorm
commands.description: Structured ideation session with decision artifacts

commands.name: component-review
commands.description: Review UI components for consistency and best practices

commands.name: converge
commands.description: Score and converge brainstormed ideas to top candidates

commands.name: design-system
commands.description: Analyze and validate design system consistency

commands.name: experiment-brief
commands.description: Create executable experiment plans with hypotheses

commands.name: hook-execute
commands.description: Execute specific Git or IDE hooks

commands.name: hook-install
commands.description: Install hooks for project automation

commands.name: hook-list
commands.description: List all available hooks and their status

commands.name: hook-status
commands.description: Check the status of installed hooks

commands.name: hook-test
commands.description: Test hook execution without running actual commands

commands.name: hook-uninstall
commands.description: Uninstall hooks from the project

commands.name: hook-validate
commands.description: Validate hook configuration files

commands.name: pr-review
commands.description: Review changes and suggest commits or PR splits

commands.name: project-health
commands.description: Generate health score with risks and technical debt areas

commands.name: refresh-plugin
commands.description: Refresh the Newt plugin installation

commands.name: responsive-check
commands.description: Check responsive design breakpoints and behavior

commands.name: review
commands.description: Full code review covering architecture, security, performance, and quality

commands.name: review-history
commands.description: Summarize past reviews and recurring issues

commands.name: ui-design
commands.description: Review UI design for visual hierarchy and UX patterns

commands.name: ux-pattern-review
commands.description: Analyze UX patterns and user experience flows
